ksa_text: Perform database administration and routine maintenance tasks, including schema optimization, patching, index management, storage allocation, performance tuning, and end-of-life planning for database systems.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop risk mitigation strategies and cybersecurity countermeasures to address cost, performance, and security risks and to resolve vulnerabilities and recommend security changes to system or system components as needed.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Develop risk mitigation strategies and cybersecurity countermeasures to address cost, performance, and security risks and to resolve vulnerabilities and recommend security changes to system or system components as needed.
Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: This task KSA describes execution-level work in Data Architecture & Analytics that is not expected of a AI CoE Leader (c suite tier). The role is responsible for overseeing and directing this work, not performing it directly. Excluded on execution-seniority grounds.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could real-world AI CoE Leader practitioners be expected to demonstrate this task KSA in practice, despite the seniority gap?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: NewVantage Partners CDO Survey, Wavestone CDAIO Report, and Gartner leadership effectiveness research confirm that c suite-tier roles delegate execution responsibilities to appropriate levels rather than owning them directly.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: seniority-based exclusion is consistent with external evidence on c suite-tier role expectations. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Execution-level task KSA in Data Architecture & Analytics is outside the expected competency scope for a AI CoE Leader (c suite tier). The role oversees this work; it does not perform it directly.
